_publications._publicationTitle: Bioluminescent imaging of intracranial vestibular schwannoma xenografts in NOD/SCID mice.

_contextSnippet: There was a statistically significant difference between the BLI at 21 weeks in the engrafting and nonengrafting group when compared by a 2-sided Wilcoxon rank-sum test ( p < 0.001)
details: Successfully differentiated engrafting from non-engrafting tumors at 21 weeks with statistically significant difference (p < 0.001) in bioluminescent imaging measurements
